rationale: TASK-057 acceptance is met: the status panel Home tab shows compact health/scope/budget/claims/GC factors; Graph tab exposes graph stats, scoped roadmap/sprint slices, build DAG edges, and reconciliation cues; Diff tab reads pending runtime diff tables or latest accepted feedback rows and supports approve/reject/defer/alternative actions; UI state remains graph/runtime-backed rather than canonical; closure briefs are persisted in implementation builds and visible through evidence/build detail.
